TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Rafael Correa = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 4 jiyax 6 ka Rafael Correa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ecuador ta sayang o kiya ka Rafael Correa, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 1 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Rafael Correa = Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado (Kari Spain: Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado; kngkawas 1963 idas 4 diyax 6Ôľć), mntuting Wayakil, Ecuador Keyjay Sweycya mi Tuiwil Pallic Mincwey Cuyi Seyji Jnwu, mnuda Soto Ecuador. NdananÁ∂ďś≠∑ Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u kngkawas 2005 idas 4 pa mnngalan Caycng Mi Keybu Bucyo qnlhangan Ecuador, idas 8 daw wada plaxan qpahun. Mndungus bay rnengaw niya pusu balay kari nanaq Spain, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa mkla balay nrmngaw kari Ingkoku mi kari France mi kari India tnualang Sediq Tnpusu uri. Wada msturung ka hiya, niqan 1 laqi snaw mi 2 laqi qridin niya. Kngkawas 2006 idas 4 cida, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa pssli Cucweyn Cukwo Ryeynmong Undo. Kngkawas 2006 idas 11, hiya u ngalan Cucweyn Cukwo Ryeynmong Undo Hosweynjn tumal Soto seyngkyo, kiya mi mniq kcka seyngkyo cida mbiyax mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2007 idas 1 diyax 15, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u wada muda psdhu phyuwan Soto Ecuador. Kngkawas 2008 idas 9 diyax 28, Ecuador u spuda Cweynmin Kongcwey wada dha pdanan ka burah keyngpo, kiya u dmuwi pnwaya burah keyngpo muda mntxan Soto seyngkyo dungan. Burah keyngpo u muda pnwaya Soto u malu muda lmutuc mntxan dungan. Kngkawas 2009 cida, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa mntxan mangal Soto Ecuador dungan. Kngkawas 2013 idas 2 diyax 17, Ecuador u muda Soto seyngkyo meytaq hyo, spuda Ecuador Knkana Qnlhangan Seyngkyo Yingkay mnuda smpu hyo, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa wada niya knou balay ini baka ka taxa hosweynjn, ginghangcya Raso, wada mndungus bay lmutuc mangal Soto dungan. Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u kngkawas 2017 daw ini uda lmutuc qpahunSoto, spuda Rining Moreyno ka lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2018 idas 7 diyax 3 cida, 1 hwakwan Ecuador u wisu muda mtqiri seyji tweyso Fernando Balda na pangcya ang muda singpang iyx cida ini usa cuting, kiya mi singsey Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado na cyupuring. Cida mnqduriq dhuq Belgium ka Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u ini sruwa ndanan hmili pnusa dha kari quri pacya. Kngkawas 2018 idas 7, Pnsliyan Kwoci Singcing u ini sruwa bnatas patas Ecuador quri pnusa kari qmraq hiya, so niyi u 'Ida balay uuda seyji kiya'. Kngkawas 2020 idas 4 diyax 7, Qnlhangan Hoying Sings Hoying ka muda pswau Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado mniq kngkawas 2012-2016 Kasossoponos Co cumi mkan pila pa niqan cumi. Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado alaw dmudul uuda mkan pila u ini dhuq wada pchuwan 8 knkawas phmkun sapah kung. Kngkawas 2012 dhuq kngkawas 2016 iyax cida, mniq Carondelet Kong wada mangal 'Cumi Pila Dnayaw', kiya ka sdayaw seyji undo niya, kiya u spriyux msupu sediq snbbari muda pbatas psdhuwan biyax qnlhangan hetong, kiya uri u brah Cuhwang Mi Pkrana Alang Mkbrnuxbu brah Sotohu Shwabu Bucyo Misu Maris de los, Angelus Duarte, brah giying qridin Viviana Bonilla, brah Waya Keyngpo Hwakwan mi Misu Pamela Mart√≠nez.
S.PHON: = …ĺa*a…ôl ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka …ĺa*a…ôl ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan …ô ¶uado…ĺ ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ĺa*a…ôl ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = …ĺa*a…ôl ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa = …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado (ka…ĺi spain: …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), mntutiŇč wajakil, …ô ¶uado…ĺ k…ô…üaj sw…ô ¶ja mi tuiwil palli ¶ min ¶w…ô ¶uji s…ô…üi …ünwu, mnuda soto …ô ¶uado…ĺ. ndanan** …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado u kŇčkawas **** idas * pa mnŇčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč mi k…ôbu bu ¶jo qnlńßaŇčan …ô ¶uado…ĺ, idas * daw wada plaxan qpańßun. mnduŇčus baj …ĺn…ôŇčaw nija pusu balaj ka…ĺi nanaq spain, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado pa mkla balaj n…ĺmŇčaw ka…ĺi iŇčkoku mi ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô mi ka…ĺi india tnualaŇč s…ôdiq tnpusu u…ĺi. wada mstu…ĺuŇč ka ńßija, niqan * laqi snaw mi * laqi q…ĺidin nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado pa pssli ¶u ¶w…ôn ¶ukwo …ĺj…ônmoŇč undo. kŇčkawas **** idas **, ńßija u Ňčalan ¶u ¶w…ôn ¶ukwo …ĺj…ônmoŇč undo ńßosw…ôn…ün tumal soto s…ôŇčkjo, kija mi mniq k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida mbijax maŇčal soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado u wada muda psdńßu pńßjuwan soto …ô ¶uado…ĺ. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ô ¶uado…ĺ u spuda ¶w…ônmin koŇč ¶w…ô wada dńßa pdanan ka bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo, kija u dmuwi pnwaja bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo muda mntxan soto s…ôŇčkjo duŇčan. bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo u muda pnwaja soto u malu muda lmutu ¶ mntxan duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado pa mntxan maŇčal soto …ô ¶uado…ĺ duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ô ¶uado…ĺ u muda soto s…ôŇčkjo m…ôtaq ńßjo, spuda …ô ¶uado…ĺ knkana qnlńßaŇčan s…ôŇčkjo jiŇčkaj mnuda smpu ńßjo, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado pa wada nija knou balaj ini baka ka taxa ńßosw…ôn…ün, giŇčńßaŇč ¶ja …ĺaso, wada mnduŇčus baj lmutu ¶ maŇčal soto duŇčan. …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado u kŇčkawas **** daw ini uda lmutu ¶ qpańßunsoto, spuda …ĺiniŇč mo…ĺ…ôno ka lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, * ńßwakwan …ô ¶uado…ĺ u wisu muda mtqi…ĺi s…ô…üi tw…ôso *…ô…ĺnando balda na paŇč ¶ja aŇč muda siŇčpaŇč ijx ¶ida ini usa ¶utiŇč, kija mi siŇčs…ô …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado na ¶jupu…ĺiŇč. ¶ida mnqdu…ĺiq dńßuq b…ôlgium ka …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado u ini s…ĺuwa ndanan ńßmili pnusa dńßa ka…ĺi qu…ĺi pa ¶ja. kŇčkawas **** idas *, pnslijan kwo ¶i siŇč ¶iŇč u ini s…ĺuwa bnatas patas …ô ¶uado…ĺ qu…ĺi pnusa ka…ĺi qm…ĺaq ńßija, so niji u 'ida balaj uuda s…ô…üi kija'. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, qnlńßaŇčan ńßojiŇč siŇčs ńßojiŇč ka muda pswau …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado mniq kŇčkawas ****-**** kasossoponos ¶o ¶umi mkan pila pa niqan ¶umi. …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado alaw dmudul uuda mkan pila u ini dńßuq wada p ¶ńßuwan * knkawas pńßmkun sapańß kuŇč. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ijax ¶ida, mniq ¶a…ĺond…ôl…ôt koŇč wada maŇčal ' ¶umi pila dnajaw', kija ka sdajaw s…ô…üi undo nija, kija u sp…ĺijux msupu s…ôdiq snbba…ĺi muda pbatas psdńßuwan bijax qnlńßaŇčan ńß…ôtoŇč, kija u…ĺi u b…ĺańß ¶uńßwaŇč mi pk…ĺana alaŇč mkb…ĺnuxbu b…ĺańß sotońßu sńßwabu bu ¶jo misu ma…ĺis d…ô los, aŇč…ôlus dua…ĺt…ô, b…ĺańß gijiŇč q…ĺidin *i*iana bonilla, b…ĺańß waja k…ôŇčpo ńßwakwan mi misu pam…ôla ma…ĺt*n…ô*.
S.FORM: = Rafael Correa = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 4 jiyax 6 ka Rafael Correa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ecuador ta sayang o kiya ka Rafael Correa, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 1 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Rafael Correa = Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado (Kari Spain: Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado; kngkawas 1963 idas 4 diyax 6Ôľć), mntuting Wayakil, Ecuador Keyjay Sweycya mi Tuiwil Pallic Mincwey Cuyi Seyji Jnwu, mnuda Soto Ecuador. NdananÁ∂ďś≠∑ Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u kngkawas 2005 idas 4 pa mnngalan Caycng Mi Keybu Bucyo qnlhangan Ecuador, idas 8 daw wada plaxan qpahun. Mndungus bay rnengaw niya pusu balay kari nanaq Spain, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa mkla balay nrmngaw kari Ingkoku mi kari France mi kari India tnualang Sediq Tnpusu uri. Wada msturung ka hiya, niqan 1 laqi snaw mi 2 laqi qridin niya. Kngkawas 2006 idas 4 cida, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa pssli Cucweyn Cukwo Ryeynmong Undo. Kngkawas 2006 idas 11, hiya u ngalan Cucweyn Cukwo Ryeynmong Undo Hosweynjn tumal Soto seyngkyo, kiya mi mniq kcka seyngkyo cida mbiyax mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2007 idas 1 diyax 15, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u wada muda psdhu phyuwan Soto Ecuador. Kngkawas 2008 idas 9 diyax 28, Ecuador u spuda Cweynmin Kongcwey wada dha pdanan ka burah keyngpo, kiya u dmuwi pnwaya burah keyngpo muda mntxan Soto seyngkyo dungan. Burah keyngpo u muda pnwaya Soto u malu muda lmutuc mntxan dungan. Kngkawas 2009 cida, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa mntxan mangal Soto Ecuador dungan. Kngkawas 2013 idas 2 diyax 17, Ecuador u muda Soto seyngkyo meytaq hyo, spuda Ecuador Knkana Qnlhangan Seyngkyo Yingkay mnuda smpu hyo, Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado pa wada niya knou balay ini baka ka taxa hosweynjn, ginghangcya Raso, wada mndungus bay lmutuc mangal Soto dungan. Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u kngkawas 2017 daw ini uda lmutuc qpahunSoto, spuda Rining Moreyno ka lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2018 idas 7 diyax 3 cida, 1 hwakwan Ecuador u wisu muda mtqiri seyji tweyso Fernando Balda na pangcya ang muda singpang iyx cida ini usa cuting, kiya mi singsey Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado na cyupuring. Cida mnqduriq dhuq Belgium ka Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado u ini sruwa ndanan hmili pnusa dha kari quri pacya. Kngkawas 2018 idas 7, Pnsliyan Kwoci Singcing u ini sruwa bnatas patas Ecuador quri pnusa kari qmraq hiya, so niyi u 'Ida balay uuda seyji kiya'. Kngkawas 2020 idas 4 diyax 7, Qnlhangan Hoying Sings Hoying ka muda pswau Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado mniq kngkawas 2012-2016 Kasossoponos Co cumi mkan pila pa niqan cumi. Rafael Vicente Correa Delgado alaw dmudul uuda mkan pila u ini dhuq wada pchuwan 8 knkawas phmkun sapah kung. Kngkawas 2012 dhuq kngkawas 2016 iyax cida, mniq Carondelet Kong wada mangal 'Cumi Pila Dnayaw', kiya ka sdayaw seyji undo niya, kiya u spriyux msupu sediq snbbari muda pbatas psdhuwan biyax qnlhangan hetong, kiya uri u brah Cuhwang Mi Pkrana Alang Mkbrnuxbu brah Sotohu Shwabu Bucyo Misu Maris de los, Angelus Duarte, brah giying qridin Viviana Bonilla, brah Waya Keyngpo Hwakwan mi Misu Pamela Mart√≠nez.

soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ĺa*a…ôl *i ¶…ônt…ô ¶o…ĺ…ĺ…ôa d…ôlgado u wada muda psdńßu pńßjuwan soto …ô ¶uado…ĺ. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ô ¶uado…ĺ u spuda ¶w…ônmin koŇč ¶w…ô wada dńßa
